name: Onion, Black Olive, and Caper Compote
recipeIngredient: 2 Medium onions, halved and Sliced thin
1/2 cup Black olives, such as Kalamatas, pitted and Chopped coarse
1 tsp Minced fresh marjoram, or 1/2 Teaspoon dried
Salt and black pepper to Taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat two tablespoons olive oil in a large sauté pan.
2. Add onions and cook over medium heat until softened, about 5 minutes.
3. Add garlic; cook until fragrant, about 1 minute longer.
4. Turn off the heat and add the remaining ingredients to the bowl.
5. Serve compote warm or at room temperature.
